message:
refactor(cli): simplify config init wizard flags (bd-24l8)

Remove redundant --defaults flag (was identical to --non-interactive).
Make --non-interactive imply --wizard mode, removing the confusing
requires("wizard") constraint.

Before: rch config init --wizard --non-interactive
        rch config init --wizard --defaults        # identical
After:  rch config init --non-interactive           # implies wizard

The simple template mode (no flags) is unchanged.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
